playbook.intent: An agent ran 40 turns and lost the plot. Reconstruct the trajectory, find the bad state transition, ship a guardrail.
playbook.scope: An agent ran 40 turns and lost the plot. Reconstruct the trajectory, find the bad state transition, ship a guardrail.

success-criteria.criterion: Prep stage complete with written artifact and decision-gate note
Frame stage complete with written artifact and decision-gate note
Execute stage complete with written artifact and decision-gate note
Capture stage complete with written artifact and decision-gate note
Decide stage complete with written artifact and decision-gate note

stage.name: Prep
stage.intent: Get inputs, environment, and prior context lined up before the session starts.

tasks.task: Read the assigned methodology references and reconcile them with this stage's goal.
Produce the stage artifact named in 'outputs' and store it where the next stage can read it.
Re-check the decision gate before advancing; loop within this stage if it fails.

outputs.output: Written artifact for stage 1 (Prep) named per the project's docs convention
Decision-gate note (advance / iterate / kill) appended to the playbook log

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the stage 1 artifact exists in writing AND the methodology chain assigned to this stage has been applied. Iterate or escalate otherwise.

stage.name: Frame
stage.intent: Name the single outcome and the boundaries; lock the inputs in writing.

tasks.task: Read the assigned methodology references and reconcile them with this stage's goal.
Produce the stage artifact named in 'outputs' and store it where the next stage can read it.
Re-check the decision gate before advancing; loop within this stage if it fails.

outputs.output: Written artifact for stage 2 (Frame) named per the project's docs convention
Decision-gate note (advance / iterate / kill) appended to the playbook log

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the stage 2 artifact exists in writing AND the methodology chain assigned to this stage has been applied. Iterate or escalate otherwise.

stage.name: Execute
stage.intent: Run the core activity end-to-end without context switches.

tasks.task: Read the assigned methodology references and reconcile them with this stage's goal.
Produce the stage artifact named in 'outputs' and store it where the next stage can read it.
Re-check the decision gate before advancing; loop within this stage if it fails.

outputs.output: Written artifact for stage 3 (Execute) named per the project's docs convention
Decision-gate note (advance / iterate / kill) appended to the playbook log

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the stage 3 artifact exists in writing AND the methodology chain assigned to this stage has been applied. Iterate or escalate otherwise.

stage.name: Capture
stage.intent: Write the outputs down in a form a teammate can read later.

tasks.task: Read the assigned methodology references and reconcile them with this stage's goal.
Produce the stage artifact named in 'outputs' and store it where the next stage can read it.
Re-check the decision gate before advancing; loop within this stage if it fails.

outputs.output: Written artifact for stage 4 (Capture) named per the project's docs convention
Decision-gate note (advance / iterate / kill) appended to the playbook log

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the stage 4 artifact exists in writing AND the methodology chain assigned to this stage has been applied. Iterate or escalate otherwise.

stage.name: Decide
stage.intent: Apply the decision gate; produce a go/no-go or next-action note.

tasks.task: Read the assigned methodology references and reconcile them with this stage's goal.
Produce the stage artifact named in 'outputs' and store it where the next stage can read it.
Re-check the decision gate before advancing; loop within this stage if it fails.

outputs.output: Written artifact for stage 5 (Decide) named per the project's docs convention
Decision-gate note (advance / iterate / kill) appended to the playbook log

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the stage 5 artifact exists in writing AND the methodology chain assigned to this stage has been applied. Iterate or escalate otherwise.

extra.value: [Skipping decision-gate verification collapses the playbook into a checklist, Treating outputs as optional kills traceability and future re-use, Running stages out of order because one feels more urgent absorbs risk downstream]

['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I advance only when the decision-gate criterion was met in writing?', 'Did I document every methodology gap before it shipped to a user?']

{human: faion get-content agent-state-debug-session-cursor-replay --format md, agent: faion get-content agent-state-debug-session-cursor-replay --format context, json: faion get-content agent-state-debug-session-cursor-replay --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-03; persona=P7, angle=atomic'}]
